ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the radio show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the show */,
  "year_began" INTEGER /* Year the show started airing */,
  "year_ended" INTEGER /* Year the show ended airing */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Genre identifier for the show */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or is responsible for the show entry */,
  "time_created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  "time_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entry */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the show in minutes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the show was broadcast */,
  "trivia" TEXT /* Additional trivia or interesting facts about the show */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of a thumbnail image for the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Comedy, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edit_log" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit log entry */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show that was edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  "edit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edit was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "edit_type" TEXT /* Type of edit (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_log_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the show (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or suggestion from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_feedback_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_hosts" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode within the show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date the episode aired */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of a thumbnail image for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the episode (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or suggestion from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_feedback_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES show_episodes ("episode_id")
)
